name: chr1_intra_SD_proximal
description: Intra-chromosomal SD pile-up in proximal chr1. Local duplication block with 95-99% identity. Multi-copy at 95-99% sequence identity; assembly-uncertain in mRatBN7.2.

architecture.internal_structure: SD modules of 10-200 kb at 95-99% identity; shared duplicons across rat pericentromeric/subtelomeric regions.
